completed_tasks.name: Go module bootstrap, Docker Compose, migrations, sqlc, Makefile
Goodreads RSS sync pipeline, scheduler, admin endpoints
Metadata enrichment (Google Books + OpenLibrary), cover downloads

human_actions_pending.action: 01-HUMAN-UAT.md remains status:partial — user verified enrichment works live but formal UAT file not updated

decisions.decision: Goodreads sync via RSS feed (not API)
decisions.rationale: Goodreads API deprecated 2020; RSS still available at goodreads.com/review/list_rss

decisions.decision: gofeed item.Custom map for Goodreads fields (not item.Extensions)
decisions.rationale: Goodreads RSS fields arrive in item.Custom (flat map[string]string), not namespaced Extensions

decisions.decision: Google Books ISBN-13 primary lookup, title fallback, OpenLibrary cover fallback
decisions.rationale: ISBN-13 most reliable; title fallback for books without ISBN; OpenLibrary for covers when Google Books lacks them

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 2 or /gsd:plan-phase 2 to start the Go REST API phase
context_notes: Phase 01 fully complete and verified. 130 books synced from Goodreads RSS, enriched via Google Books API, covers saved to data/covers/. Server runs on :8081 with POST /admin/sync and POST /admin/import-csv. PostgreSQL on Docker. make and migrate CLI installed on Windows. Ready to build the REST API layer next.
